segments.text: These are some of the smoothest, most reflective mirrors in the world. You think your fridge is smooth? No, it's
bumpy. These mirrors are polished to be thousands of times smoother with bumps only a few atoms thick. They weigh 40 kg
or 88 lb. A typical mirror in your bathroom is about 90 to 95% reflective. But these mirrors reflect 99.9999%
of the light that hits them. But wait,
that doesn't look like a mirror. You can see right through it. That's because these mirrors get coated with dozens of layers of different materials to perfect their reflectiveness. But now they
definitely don't look like mirrors. And that's because they're not for visible light. They're made to reflect infrared light. Light from this infrared laser.
It's part of the most precise experiment humans have ever built. If you want to see what it does, subscribe.
